summary: Frontend-only validation of Contact page content fix + Shade Card → Google Drive URL rewiring across all entry points. 22/22 DOM checks passed, 0 console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: PublicLayout.jsx: when l.external is true, the Link in footer for that entry now correctly renders as <a target=_blank>; desktop nav also branches correctly — both look clean.

Contact.jsx: site fallbacks are hardcoded inline (smpaints2001@gmail.com, +91 76691 53715, Chandni Chowk, 917669153715). Consider centralizing these constants in a shared module to avoid drift if the brand details change again.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend changes verified via DOM-level Playwright checks against preview URL. Drive URL https://drive.google.com/file/d/1l96sYgM3wdMgGpdAs842_eAFRJDGB8xl/view is correctly wired on: desktop nav-shade-card, mobile nav-mobile-shade-card, hero-cta-colors (Home), product-detail-shades (ProductDetail). Contact page correctly shows SM Paint details with no leftover placeholder text. /api/site/config returns 200 with all expected keys. No console/page errors during regression sweep of Home/Products/Brands. Did not actually navigate to drive.google.com (intentionally — would require Google auth).
